message:
Add pytest foundation: assert, imports, __name__ guard

Enables pytest-style testing in PyAOT for faster feedback loops.

Features implemented:

1. assert statement (Agent 1)
   - Syntax: assert condition, "message"
   - Generates: if (!(condition)) { std.debug.panic(...) }
   - Test: Passing assertions work, failing crashes with message

2. Import parsing (Agent 2)
   - Syntax: from module import name1, name2
   - Generates: // from module import ... (commented out)
   - Allows single-file tests with import statements at top

3. __name__ guard (Agent 3)
   - Syntax: if __name__ == "__main__":
   - Generates: const __name__ = "__main__"; + proper comparison
   - Bonus: Fixed string comparison (uses std.mem.eql)
   - Bonus: Fixed void function detection (no return statement)

Test results:
- 14/89 regression tests passing (unchanged - need classes/slicing)
- NEW: pytest-style test files now work!

Working example:
```python
def add(a, b):
    return a + b

def test_add():
    assert add(2, 3) == 5
    print("✓ test passed")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    test_add()
```

Files modified:
- src/analysis/native_types.zig (+3 lines)
- src/codegen/native/expressions.zig (+56 lines)
- src/codegen/native/main.zig (+11 lines)
- src/codegen/native/statements.zig (+75 lines)

Total: +145 lines, -12 refactored

Implemented by: 3 parallel agents
